hooks.command: echo '[TramitUp] Editando: ' && echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /c/Users/Ruben/Desktop/TramitUp/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd /c/Users/Ruben/Desktop/TramitUp/backend && python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo '[OK] Python syntax OK' || echo '[ERROR] Python syntax error'; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read line; do echo "[WARN] console.log encontrado: $line"; done; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python3 -c "import ast, sys; code=open('$FILE').read(); tree=ast.parse(code); imports=[n.names[0].name if isinstance(n,ast.Import) else n.module for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n,(ast.Import,ast.ImportFrom))]; print('[OK] Imports verificados:', len([i for i in imports if i]))" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
